findings.title: Baseline layout
findings.detail: This sample preserves a textbook three-tier pattern with CDN static assets over HTTPS origins.

findings.title: Identity hygiene
findings.detail: Application uses managed identity for SQL connectivity and restricts secrets to Key Vault references.

findings.title: Network posture
findings.detail: Data plane resources are reachable through private endpoints; public HTTPS terminates at CDN.

findings.title: Documentation debt
findings.detail: Runbooks cite quarterly DR rehearsals but do not link automated evidence.
